$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
title: RepositoryPolicy
description:
RepositoryPolicy pairs a repository with the Policy to use for uploads to
it.

policy.description:
Policy is used for uploads to Repository. When omitted, it behaves as
Never.

repository.description: Repository is the repository this entry applies to.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: Policy
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description:
Policy decides whether a resource upload also records the owning
component version, so a consumer can trace a stored blob back to its
component (ADR 0016).

oneOf.description:
PolicyNever never writes ownership referrers. This is the behavior
when no policy is set.

PolicyAddIfSupported writes an ownership referrer for every resource
when the target registry supports referrers.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description: Raw is used to hold extensions that dynamically define behavior at runtime

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: Type
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description: Type represents a structured type with an optional version and a name. It is used to identify the type of an object in a versioned API.
